title: malva pallescens
intro: Malva pallescens, also known as the pale mallow, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and soothing properties, often applied topically to treat skin irritations and wounds. The plant is rich in mucilage, a natural gel-like substance that can help to protect and heal the skin, making it beneficial for reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Malva pallescens can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and salves to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
